css_layout_rules.profile_hero: padding: 3rem 1.5rem 0; background: var(--gradient-hero); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; text-align: center;
css_layout_rules.tabs_container: display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); overflow-x: auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
css_layout_rules.tab_btn: flex-shrink: 0; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease;
css_layout_rules.content_card: background: var(--surface-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); padding: 2rem;
